title: Alloy Composition
description: Schema for alloy composition records including elemental stoichiometry and experimental validation status

sample_id.description: Unique identifier for the alloy sample

elements.description: List of elemental symbols in the alloy

items.description: Valid chemical element symbol (e.g., Cu, Zr, Fe)

stoichiometry.description: Atomic fractions corresponding to each element

source.description: Data source for this composition (e.g., Materials Project, experimental database)

experimental_validation_status.description: Status of experimental validation per Constitution IV traceability requirements

cooling_rate.description: Cooling rate in K/s, if measured (per reviewer rosalind-franklin-simulated feedback on thermal history)

thermal_history_notes.description: Additional notes on thermal processing history

xrd_confirmed.description: Whether X-ray diffraction confirmed glass structure

data_row_id.description: UUID for traceability linking to source data
